records.title: Travel with a contactless payment card
records.description: OVpay allows occasional travellers to check in and out with the same supported contactless debit card, credit card, phone or smartwatch without first buying a separate card.
records.ai_summary: Remove the chosen card from a wallet before tapping and use exactly the same physical card or device to check out. A phone wallet and its underlying plastic card can have different identifiers.

records.title: Understand the new OV-pas
records.description: The OV-pas is the new dedicated public-transport card within OVpay and is being introduced as the successor option while existing OV-chipkaarts continue during the transition.
records.ai_summary: Use the official switch guidance to decide whether a payment card or OV-pas fits current subscriptions and discounts. Do not discard an existing card until products and balances are handled.

records.title: Use a personal OV-chipkaart
records.description: A personal OV-chipkaart is registered to its holder and can support subscriptions, age-related discounts, automatic reload and recovery options after loss or theft.
records.ai_summary: Choose a personal card when a named subscription, automatic reload or recoverability is required. Keep contact details current so expiry and service messages reach the cardholder.

records.title: Configure automatic OV-chipkaart reload
records.description: Automatic reload adds a chosen amount to a personal OV-chipkaart when its balance is insufficient and later collects that amount by direct debit.
records.ai_summary: Verify the linked IBAN and chosen reload amount, then collect or activate the order as instructed. Monitor travel history and direct debits so failed or unexpected reloads are addressed quickly.

records.title: Review OVpay journeys and charges
records.description: The official OVpay service lets a traveller retrieve recent journeys and charges using the payment reference and amount, or the identifiers of an OV-pas.
records.ai_summary: Find the NLOV reference in the bank statement and compare each journey with actual travel. Use the official service to correct missing taps and generate expense evidence where available.

records.title: Correct a missed public-transport check-out
records.description: A missing check-out can create a correction or boarding charge, and the recovery route depends on whether travel used OVpay, OV-chipkaart, NS Flex or another operator.

official_source.title: Forgot to check in or check out

records.ai_summary: Wait until the journey is available, select the correct payment method and operator, and submit the missing destination through the official channel. Check the bank or card history for the refund.

records.title: Handle an expiring OV-chipkaart
records.description: OV-chipkaart provides expiry reminders and balance-recovery guidance, with automatic notices for personal cards and an optional email reminder for anonymous cards.
records.ai_summary: Check the printed expiry date and arrange replacement, product transfer and balance recovery before relying on the card for travel. Use the transition guidance when selecting a newer payment method.

records.title: Block or replace a lost OV-chipkaart
records.description: A lost or stolen personal OV-chipkaart should be reported promptly so it can be blocked and eligible products or remaining balance can be handled through the official process.
records.ai_summary: Block a named card through the official account or customer service as soon as possible. Record the card number separately and follow the stated replacement and product-transfer steps.

records.title: Request an OV-chipkaart balance refund
records.description: Official OV-chipkaart forms cover reclaiming remaining credit from expired, broken or terminated cards, with different routes depending on card type and balance.
records.ai_summary: Choose the form matching personal or anonymous card status and whether the card is expired, broken or active. Verify bank details carefully and retain confirmation until the credit arrives.

records.title: Understand payment and journey data in OV systems
records.description: Translink explains how identity, card, payment and journey information is processed for card services, transaction handling, refunds, security and customer support.
records.ai_summary: Use official accounts and protect card identifiers, payment references and travel history. Review privacy controls before exporting expenses or sharing a journey overview with another party.
